visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women, one in a white tiered dress and grey cardigan and the other in a brown vest and white long-sleeve top, stand before a modern building entrance at night. The lighting is warm and bright, casting soft shadows. (2) A close-up displays a backlit white rectangular sign with the text '暖*雪' and 'DANSETSU SAPPORO' on a dark textured wall. (3) The woman in the white dress walks down a city sidewalk at night; the background shows various storefronts and streetlights. (4) A woman in navy pajamas holds a wicker basket and white towel in front of a red and white 'Women' hot spring curtain. (5) Inside a wooden-paneled wellness area, several light-wood lounge chairs are neatly arranged. A subsequent shot reveals a sauna room with tiered wooden benches. (6) A large indoor hot spring pool glows with blue underwater lighting against a backdrop of grey stone walls. (7) A pink and grey Dyson hairdryer is featured in a close-up, placed on a metallic stand next to a stone washbasin. (8) The woman in the white dress stands in a lounge area; a wine dispenser pours liquid into a glass, followed by a shot of a beer machine dispensing a glass of beer. (9) A close-up shows a wooden tray filled with assorted donuts, muffins, and croissants. (10) The woman demonstrates a touch-screen coffee machine in a modern lobby. (11) Both women sit on a grey sofa in a hotel room, eating donuts and drinking from glasses. (12) Inside a hotel room, a woman opens a closet door to reveal two large suitcases and hanging coats. (13) A shot of the bathroom reveals a clean white toilet and a bathtub with a showerhead. (14) The woman gestures toward a living area with a grey sofa, small round table, and two twin beds with white linens. (15) A close-up highlights a power outlet on a wooden desk. (16) A view through the room's window shows city lights at night. (17) In a kitchen area, hands use a strainer to prepare noodles in a pot of boiling water. (18) A breakfast buffet is shown with fresh salads, salmon, and various Japanese dishes on a wooden tray.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 札幌市中心的. (2) [Logo]: 暖雪 DANSETSU SAPPORO. (3) [Variety]: 超級方便的. (4) [Subtitle]: 竟然還有溫泉可以泡 (男湯/女湯). (5) [Variety]: 天然溫泉大浴場. (6) [Variety]: 三溫暖. (7) [Subtitle]: 吹風機用Dyson超棒. (8) [Slogan]: 豪華休息室讓你吃到飽. (9) [Subtitle]: 有高級的酒水. (10) [Subtitle]: 現榨的啤酒. (11) [Subtitle]: 這麼多的可頌. (12) [Subtitle]: 甜甜圈讓你選. (13) [Subtitle]: 現磨的咖啡豆 還可以喝拿鐵. (14) [Subtitle]: 碳酸水跟茶也是應有盡有喔. (15) [Subtitle]: 他的咖啡 酒水都做的很棒 沒有敷衍你. (16) [Subtitle]: 一進來以後 我們旁邊呢 可以放兩個大行李箱. (17) [Subtitle]: 有貼心的全身鏡. (18) [Subtitle]: 那旁邊呢置物區 也可以放很多東西. (19) [Subtitle]: 掛衣籃也是給好給滿. (20) [Variety]: 已經有溫泉浴場了. (21) [Subtitle]: 你的浴室還是可以... 有自己的浴缸. (22) [Subtitle]: 這邊呢是一個 非常舒適的corner角落. (23) [Subtitle]: 你可以買食物在這邊跟朋友小聚聊天. (24) [Subtitle]: 桌面呢 也非常貼心 有桌面的插座. (25) [Subtitle]: 充電會非常的好插 然後充電器不會忘記帶走. (26) [Subtitle]: 接下來就是床 然後外面可以看到一些市景 還有電視. (27) [Slogan]: 非常溫馨舒適的飯店唷. (28) [Variety]: 免費的. (29) [Subtitle]: 宵夜還可以吃拉麵. (30) [Subtitle]: 早餐選擇也很豐富哦. (31) [Subtitle]: 借腳踏車也超方便.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair, wearing a white tiered dress and grey cardigan. The second woman wears a black beret, a tan vest over a white top, and dark boots.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern hotel interiors featuring light wood paneling, clean minimalist furniture, a hot spring area with stone walls and blue lighting, and a well-lit lobby lounge with food displays.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, cheerful female voice begins speaking in an energetic Mandarin tone, accompanied by an upbeat acoustic guitar and percussion BGM at approximately 120 BPM. The voice is clear and prominent. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as the speaker highlights the hotel's location, maintaining high vocal arousal and pitch variability. The BGM continues seamlessly. (3) A subtle digital 'pop' sound effect occurs as the scene transitions to the hot spring. The speaker's delivery remains rapid and engaging, with no audible ambient floor noise. (4) The sound of liquid pouring into a glass is heard clearly over the music, marking the introduction of the lounge's beverage service. The vocal tone is consistently warm and inviting. (5) A series of 'ding' sound effects accentuate points about room amenities like the Dyson hairdryer and closet space. The music and speech overlap continuously throughout the montage. (6) The vocal energy peaks during the description of free late-night ramen and breakfast, concluded by a soft musical fade-out as the final bicycle scene is presented.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Facility Tour -> Food Experience -> Room Review -> Extra Perks -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a comprehensive review and recommendation of the 'Dansetsu Sapporo' hotel, emphasizing its convenient location, luxury amenities like Dyson dryers and hot springs, and generous free food and beverage offerings.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of hotel amenities, branding, and high praise for services.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses high-energy editing and upbeat audio to position the hotel as a high-value, 'all-inclusive' style experience for urban travelers.
